sections.changelog:
4.7.3

  • Fix player not rendering on independent.ng — Soledad theme bypasses the_content filter for our handler, so the server-side selector match never runs. Enable wp_footer JS fallback (.entry-content target) to inject the player slot client-side. Also corrects the publication name to 'independent' (matches the canonical bundle at player.instaread.co/js/instaread.independent.js).
